svg.title: GoHybridAI pipeline with discovery and execution failure points marked
svg.desc: Full pipeline from Jira ticket to execution showing where discovery and execution are currently failing

g.text: Bug / Story · linked tickets · bot filter · module detect
Login → menu match → navigate → DOM scan → cache
Finds only 6 buttons · misses span.k-grid-add · no permission flag
Gemini · Bug mode vs Story mode · 4–8 scenarios
Gemini writes CSS selectors from stale/bad discovery cache
Bug ticket gets happy-path steps · .k-i-plus hallucinated
Bad selectors from phase 4 · .k-i-plus not a button

svg.text: Fix discovery → test cases get good selectors → execution passes
Everything downstream of discovery is poisoned by it
